Query:
UNLOAD (SELECT eiaid_weights.eiaid AS eiaid, sum(1) AS sample_count, sum(bs.weight * eiaid_weights.weight) AS units_count, sum(bs."out.site_energy.net.energy_consumption" * bs.weight * eiaid_weights.weight) AS "site_energy.net.energy_consumption", sum(bs."out.site_energy.total.energy_consumption" * bs.weight * eiaid_weights.weight) AS "site_energy.total.energy_consumption" 
FROM resstock_2024_amy2018_release_2_metadata AS bs JOIN eiaid_weights ON bs."in.county" = eiaid_weights.gisjoin 
WHERE bs.applicability = true AND bs.upgrade = 0 GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY 1) 
 TO 's3://resstock-core/bsq_athena_unload_results/313eb7a22fda835f58700e2beae0d1817e1c39a28a07669ea59f5173dad921d3/81bf9688-2a17-453a-97bf-e0ba1a1838ee/' 
 WITH (format = 'PARQUET')
